'''Mal Biron''' was a [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
==Biography==
[[File:MalBiron-SecretsOfTheSisarRun.png|thumb|left|200px|Mal Biron relaxes.]]
Bron was a former [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] scout who was forced from his job with the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and their [[Humanocentrism]] policies. He subsequently joined [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] as a smuggler and represented [[Sprax]] as an unofficial [[Uvena system/Legends|Uvena system]] representative.

His skills as a pilot and smuggler were high, having polished them during several perilous jobs during a series of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] gang wars on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] he organized a dangerous race near the [[Novolek Beacon/Legends|Novolek Beacon]] to evaluate the skills of several potential employees for Sprax.

Mal traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC]] [[Barloz-class medium freighter/Legends|''Barloz-class'' freighter]] called ''[[Eyeshine]]''.
[[File:Mal_Biron_signature.png|thumb|right|200px|Mal Biron's signature.]]
==Characteristics==
Mal was a middle-aged Shistavanen, with graying fur, a missing left ear and chipped teeth. He dressed in khakis resembling the field uniforms of the Republic's scout service.
